seo.title: Care Staffing Agency Hammersmith and Fulham | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Reliable, CQC-compliant care staffing in Hammersmith and Fulham — healthcare assistants, support workers, live-in carers, and emergency cover, available 24/7.
seo.focus_keyword: care staffing agency hammersmith and fulham

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.sub: Vigil Care Staffing supplies vetted healthcare assistants, support workers, live-in carers, and short-notice cover to care providers across Hammersmith and Fulham.
fields.heading: Care Staffing Agency in Hammersmith and Fulham
fields.image_alt: Vetted support worker assisting a resident at a care home in Hammersmith and Fulham

fields.body: Hammersmith and Fulham has a busy care sector spread across Fulham, Shepherd's Bush, Hammersmith, White City, Parsons Green, and Sands End, including residential and nursing homes, supported living schemes, and private households. When a shift falls short, these services need a staffing partner who responds quickly and sends people who have been thoroughly checked. Vigil Care Staffing supplies vetted care-sector workers to fill rota gaps reliably for providers across the borough. We are a staffing agency rather than a regulated care provider, so our focus is on placing the right, fully vetted worker on your shift. Every worker we supply is DBS-checked and referenced before they arrive, and our work here is part of our wider coverage across Greater London.
fields.heading: Care staffing in Hammersmith and Fulham

items.body: When a care home in Fulham or a supported living service in Shepherd's Bush loses cover unexpectedly, we act quickly to place a suitable worker, often the same day.
items.title: Rapid response times

items.body: Our coordinators understand the pattern of residential homes, nursing homes, and supported living across Hammersmith, White City, Parsons Green, and Sands End.
items.title: Local knowledge

items.body: For repeat and ongoing bookings we return the same familiar healthcare assistants and support workers where we can, so residents keep seeing trusted faces.
items.title: Continuity of care

items.body: We match workers to the role you describe, from elderly and dementia care to complex and live-in support, drawing on a pool suited to Hammersmith and Fulham settings.
items.title: Specialist matching

items.body: Every worker we supply in the borough is DBS-checked, right-to-work verified, and referenced through a CQC-aligned recruitment process before their first shift.
items.title: Compliance-conscious vetting

fields.body: We support residential and nursing care homes, supported living schemes, rehabilitation and step-down units, day centres, and private households throughout Hammersmith and Fulham, from Fulham and Parsons Green to Hammersmith, Shepherd's Bush, and White City. Because the borough sits within our wider Greater London coverage, we can draw on nearby workers when demand rises, keeping travel short and arrival dependable. Our coordination team stays in close contact and follows up promptly on every request, whether it is planned leave, sickness cover, or an urgent night-shift gap in Fulham.
fields.heading: Care staffing across Hammersmith and Fulham and surrounding areas
fields.image_alt: Care staffing agency in Hammersmith and Fulham team providing support

items.a: Yes. We supply care-sector workers across Hammersmith and Fulham, including Fulham, Shepherd's Bush, Hammersmith, White City, and Parsons Green, as part of our coverage across Greater London.
items.q: Do you cover the whole of Hammersmith and Fulham?

items.a: We provide cover at short notice, often the same day for urgent gaps. Sharing the shift details and role early helps us place the most suitable worker.
items.q: How quickly can you supply care staff in the borough?

items.a: We supply healthcare assistants, support workers, live-in carers, night-shift staff, and short-notice cover for residential, nursing, and supported living settings in Hammersmith and Fulham.
Yes. We handle single shifts, planned rota gaps, and longer assignments, and we aim to return the same familiar workers to your service for continuity.
items.q: Do you offer both temporary and longer-term cover?
